title: Check package version pins
description: Compare renv.lock against installed versions to surface reproducibility drift.
body: Use when verifying that an R analysis will reproduce. Actions: read renv.lock, compare each pinned version against the installed library, and report any package that is unpinned or drifted. List the specific package and version gap rather than a pass/fail verdict. Do not declare an analysis reproducible without confirming the lockfile covers every loaded package. This skill is read-only and must not install or upgrade packages without permission. Validation signals include a per-package pinned-versus-installed comparison. Risk boundary: a loaded package missing from the lockfile breaks reproducibility — flag it for snapshotting.
